# ColorPicker

A comprehensive color picker component with color area, channel sliders, swatches, eye dropper, and input fields. Composed of many sub-components for a fully customizable color selection experience.

## Import

```jsx
import { ColorPicker } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `ColorPicker` | The root wrapper that manages color state |
| `ColorPicker.Control` | Container for the trigger and value display |
| `ColorPicker.Trigger` | Button to open the color picker popover |
| `ColorPicker.Content` | The popover content container |
| `ColorPicker.Positioner` | Positions the popover relative to the trigger |
| `ColorPicker.Area` | The 2D color selection area (saturation/brightness) |
| `ColorPicker.AreaBackground` | Background gradient for the color area |
| `ColorPicker.AreaThumb` | Draggable thumb in the color area |
| `ColorPicker.ChannelSlider` | A slider for a specific color channel (hue, alpha, etc.) |
| `ColorPicker.ChannelSliderTrack` | Track for a channel slider |
| `ColorPicker.ChannelSliderThumb` | Draggable thumb for a channel slider |
| `ColorPicker.ChannelInput` | An input field for a specific color channel |
| `ColorPicker.TransparencyGrid` | Checkerboard pattern for transparency display |
| `ColorPicker.SwatchGroup` | Container for preset color swatches |
| `ColorPicker.SwatchTrigger` | Clickable swatch that selects a preset color |
| `ColorPicker.Swatch` | Visual swatch displaying a color |
| `ColorPicker.SwatchIndicator` | Indicator showing selected swatch |
| `ColorPicker.EyeDropperTrigger` | Button to activate the browser eye dropper |
| `ColorPicker.Input` | Hex color text input (shortcut for `ChannelInput` with channel="hex") |
| `ColorPicker.Label` | Label for the color picker |
| `ColorPicker.ValueText` | Displays the current color value as text |
| `ColorPicker.ValueSwatch` | Displays the current color as a swatch |
| `ColorPicker.View` | Container for a specific color format view |
| `ColorPicker.FormatSelect` | Dropdown to switch between color formats |
| `ColorPicker.HiddenInput` | Hidden input for form submission |
| `ColorPicker.ChannelSliderLabel` | Label text for a channel slider (e.g., "Hue", "Alpha") |
| `ColorPicker.ChannelSliderValueText` | Displays the current value of a channel slider |
| `ColorPicker.FormatTrigger` | Button to toggle between color formats |
| `ColorPicker.Sliders` | Container that renders all channel sliders together |
| `ColorPicker.ChannelText` | Displays a color channel value as text |
| `ColorPicker.EyeDropper` | Eye dropper component for picking colors from the screen |

## ColorPicker (Root) Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `defaultValue` | `string` | - | Initial color value (e.g., `"#ff0000"`, `"rgba(255,0,0,1)"`) |
| `value` | `string` | - | Controlled color value |
| `onValueChange` | `(details: { value: string, valueAsColor: Color }) => void` | - | Callback fired when the color changes |
| `onValueChangeEnd` | `(details: { value: string, valueAsColor: Color }) => void` | - | Callback fired when interaction ends |
| `format` | `"rgba" \| "hsla" \| "hsba" \| "hexa"` | `"rgba"` | The color format |
| `closeOnSelect` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether to close the picker when a swatch is selected |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the color picker is disabled |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the root element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<ColorPicker defaultValue="#3b82f6">
  <ColorPicker.Label>Color</ColorPicker.Label>
  <ColorPicker.Control>
    <ColorPicker.Trigger />
    <ColorPicker.ValueSwatch />
  </ColorPicker.Control>
  <ColorPicker.Positioner>
    <ColorPicker.Content>
      <ColorPicker.Area />
      <ColorPicker.ChannelSlider channel="hue" />
      <ColorPicker.ChannelSlider channel="alpha" />
    </ColorPicker.Content>
  </ColorPicker.Positioner>
</ColorPicker>
```

### With swatches

```jsx
<ColorPicker defaultValue="#3b82f6">
  <ColorPicker.Control>
    <ColorPicker.Trigger />
  </ColorPicker.Control>
  <ColorPicker.Positioner>
    <ColorPicker.Content>
      <ColorPicker.Area />
      <ColorPicker.ChannelSlider channel="hue" />
      <ColorPicker.SwatchGroup>
        {["#ff0000", "#00ff00", "#0000ff", "#ffff00", "#ff00ff"].map((color) => (
          <ColorPicker.SwatchTrigger key={color} value={color}>
            <ColorPicker.Swatch value={color} />
          </ColorPicker.SwatchTrigger>
        ))}
      </ColorPicker.SwatchGroup>
    </ColorPicker.Content>
  </ColorPicker.Positioner>
</ColorPicker>
```

### With hex input

```jsx
<ColorPicker defaultValue="#3b82f6">
  <ColorPicker.Control>
    <ColorPicker.Trigger />
    <ColorPicker.Input />
  </ColorPicker.Control>
  <ColorPicker.Positioner>
    <ColorPicker.Content>
      <ColorPicker.Area />
      <ColorPicker.ChannelSlider channel="hue" />
    </ColorPicker.Content>
  </ColorPicker.Positioner>
</ColorPicker>
```

### With eye dropper

```jsx
<ColorPicker defaultValue="#3b82f6">
  <ColorPicker.Control>
    <ColorPicker.Trigger />
  </ColorPicker.Control>
  <ColorPicker.Positioner>
    <ColorPicker.Content>
      <ColorPicker.Area />
      <ColorPicker.ChannelSlider channel="hue" />
      <ColorPicker.EyeDropperTrigger>Pick Color</ColorPicker.EyeDropperTrigger>
    </ColorPicker.Content>
  </ColorPicker.Positioner>
</ColorPicker>
```

### With labeled sliders and format trigger

```jsx
<ColorPicker defaultValue="#3b82f6">
  <ColorPicker.Control>
    <ColorPicker.Trigger />
    <ColorPicker.ValueText />
  </ColorPicker.Control>
  <ColorPicker.Positioner>
    <ColorPicker.Content>
      <ColorPicker.Area />
      <ColorPicker.Sliders>
        <ColorPicker.ChannelSlider channel="hue">
          <ColorPicker.ChannelSliderLabel>Hue</ColorPicker.ChannelSliderLabel>
          <ColorPicker.ChannelSliderValueText />
        </ColorPicker.ChannelSlider>
        <ColorPicker.ChannelSlider channel="alpha">
          <ColorPicker.ChannelSliderLabel>Alpha</ColorPicker.ChannelSliderLabel>
          <ColorPicker.ChannelSliderValueText />
        </ColorPicker.ChannelSlider>
      </ColorPicker.Sliders>
      <ColorPicker.FormatTrigger />
      <ColorPicker.EyeDropper />
    </ColorPicker.Content>
  </ColorPicker.Positioner>
</ColorPicker>
```

### With format selector

```jsx
<ColorPicker defaultValue="#3b82f6">
  <ColorPicker.Control>
    <ColorPicker.Trigger />
    <ColorPicker.ValueText />
  </ColorPicker.Control>
  <ColorPicker.Positioner>
    <ColorPicker.Content>
      <ColorPicker.Area />
      <ColorPicker.ChannelSlider channel="hue" />
      <ColorPicker.ChannelSlider channel="alpha" />
      <ColorPicker.FormatSelect />
      <ColorPicker.ChannelInput channel="hex" />
    </ColorPicker.Content>
  </ColorPicker.Positioner>
  <ColorPicker.HiddenInput />
</ColorPicker>
```

## Features

- Full-featured color picker with area, sliders, swatches, and inputs
- Supports multiple color formats: RGBA, HSLA, HSBA, HEXA
- Eye dropper support for picking colors from the screen
- Preset color swatches for quick selection
- Format selector to switch between color representations
- Compound component pattern for fully customizable layouts
- Hidden input for native form submission
- Each sub-component forwards refs to its underlying DOM element
